videos.title: PGA Championship picks, Cameron Young’s Dad joins | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA Championship picks, Cameron Young’s Dad joins | The Drop The Drop has all you need in terms of picks and previews for this week’s PGA Championship, the second major of the year. 2-time PGA TOUR winner Matt Every goes through where the top players will finish, what feats are likely to be accomplished and who will ultimately hoist the Wanamaker Trophy on Sunday. We welcome to the show PGA of America professional David Young– who also happens to be the father of Cameron Young, the FedExCup leader and #3 in the Official World Golf Ranking. He talks about his son’s play, what he’s like off the course and what it has been like to watch Cameron rise to the top of his sport. In another edition of Every Tuesday, Ben Griffin visited with Matt Every over a fishing trip at Doral and talked about his career, what he does to prepare for a tournament and a humorous recounting of the time he took too much creatine before a round last year.

00:00 Introduction
00:37 Preview of the PGA Championship
02:25 Predictions with Matt Every
05:51 The EliminaTOUR’s Pick to Win
08:19 Matt Every’s Pick to Win
09:01 Interview with Cameron Young’s dad 
13:25 Fishing with Ben Griffin: Every Tuesday 
18:56 Recap from the Carolinas

videos.title: Proper Puck Protection
videos.summary_source_text:
Proper Puck Protection The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

About Train 2.0:

videos.title: How To Drive it Better Without Even Practicing & STOP losing Golf Balls!
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Drive it Better Without Even Practicing & STOP losing Golf Balls! How To Drive it Better Without Even Practicing & STOP losing Golf Balls!

In today’s #tourtrucktuesday upload we talk about your responsibilities when it comes to being a great driver of the golf ball.

Yes having a dialed in driver is crucial but so too is how you strategically set up to use that driver and the targets your choose.

I also believe massively in tee height and how that can impact the way you deliver the golf club, all demonstrated within.

Sometimes the perfect launch and spin numbers aren’t a priority, golf is about the lowest score, keep that in mind and adjust your delivery accordingly.

The Trott Shop is open.

videos.title: Try This Skating Trick For Faster Acceleration
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Skating Trick For Faster Acceleration Want to learn how to accelerate faster? Forget about swinging your arms harder or pushing with more tension. This is about understanding the game of hockey and adjusting your movement patterns accordingly to match the NHL’s best.

If you’ve ever watched an NHL game or observed players around the rink, you’ve probably noticed that they rarely employ the traditional straight-line sprinting technique. Instead, they utilize a variety of transitional movements like crossunders, corkscrews, punch turns, and pivots. The classic, textbook make a diamond with your blades and take off, rarely happens.

So, what’s the secret to becoming a better accelerator on the ice? Embracing these unique movements and incorporating them into your training. Instead of relying on the forward stride, we encourage you to use crossunders to accelerate as soon as you touch the puck or need to gain open space. Want to learn how to accelerate faster? Forget about swinging your arms harder or pushing with more tension. This is about understanding the game of hockey and adjusting your movement patterns accordingly to match the NHL’s best.

If you’ve ever watched an NHL game or observed players around the rink, you’ve probably noticed that they rarely employ the traditional straight-line sprinting technique. Instead, they utilize a variety of transitional movements like crossunders, corkscrews, punch turns, and pivots. The classic, textbook make a diamond with your blades and take off, rarely happens.

So, what’s the secret to becoming a better accelerator on the ice? Embracing these unique movements and incorporating them into your training. Instead of relying on the forward stride, we encourage you to use crossunders to accelerate as soon as you touch the puck or need to gain open space.

videos.title: 🔥 Brownies in 5 minutes! No white flour! No sugar! A quick dessert
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 Brownies in 5 minutes! No white flour! No sugar! A quick dessert 🔥 Brownies in 5 minutes! No white flour! No sugar! A quick dessert for the whole family. It's so delicious, I could make it every day!

2 eggs.
1 tbsp stevia powder (no maltodextrin).
1.7 oz (50 g) sugar-free dark chocolate.
1 oz (30 g) butter.
1/4 tsp salt. 1/3 cup (70 g) spelt flour.
1/4 cup (40 g) walnuts.
Bake in a preheated oven at 355°F (180°C) for 15–20 minutes.

videos.title: The Downswing Move That Ruins Your Strike
videos.summary_source_text:
The Downswing Move That Ruins Your Strike ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=12.05.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=12.05.26

If you’re struggling to find the middle of the clubface, this lesson could explain why.
In this session, Michael, a 3-handicap golfer, was hitting poor strikes and even the occasional shank, despite having a pretty solid golf swing. The real issue wasn’t what he thought it was.
We uncovered one key downswing move that was causing his contact problems: early extension. As his lower body moved towards the golf ball, he lost space and exposed the heel of the club, leading to inconsistent strikes.

In the lesson, we walk through:
- why this happens
- how it affects strike location
- two simple drills to create more space
- how to start finding the center of the face more consistently

Once Michael understood the real cause and felt the fix, the change in strike was immediate.
If you’ve got a decent swing but still struggle with clean contact, this is well worth a watch.

videos.title: I Shortened My Backswing… and Everything Changed
videos.summary_source_text:
I Shortened My Backswing… and Everything Changed Unlock the secret to hitting your irons further and more consistently with this simple but powerful drill.

If you’re tired of coming up short with your irons, struggling to find pure contact, or losing distance on approach shots, this drill could completely transform your ball striking. In today’s lesson, Alex Elliott walks you step-by-step through an incredible training move designed to help you:

Gain effortless distance with every iron
Strike the ball first, then the turf
Improve swing consistency and accuracy
Build confidence with your mid and long irons

Whether you’re a beginner looking for more solid contact or a mid-handicap golfer chasing extra distance, these drills are designed to help golfers of all levels hit their irons further and straighter.

Key moments in this video:

00:01 How any why I have shortened my backswing
00:20 How to take this to the golf course
00:32 Backswing feeling compact - Drill 1 
1:32 How to get ball then divot
2:10 How to stop topping the golf ball
2:40 How to practice the feeling on the driving range 
3:03 How to know whether you are doing the drill for your backswing right or wrong
4:00 Backswing and downswing coming together 
5:06 Get in the slot 
5:28 How to take it to the golf course
6:26 How to get ball then turf on the golf course

videos.title: Amateur Golfers Can Skip Bunker Practice
videos.summary_source_text:
Amateur Golfers Can Skip Bunker Practice I created The BX-1 alongside former Nike club designer Josh Boggs, a winner of 12 Golf Digest “Hot List” awards.

Let's go over the Top 8 Reasons Amateur Golfers Can Skip Hundreds of Hours of Bunker Practice with the BX1 Wedge

1. **Reduced Setup Complexity**: With the BX-1, there's no need for the complex setup adjustments required for traditional wedges. Amateurs can avoid the need to practice opening the club face, adjusting stances, and hand positions.

2. **Increased Margin for Error**: The BX-1's design provides a larger margin for error. Unlike traditional wedges where even minor setup mistakes lead to disastrous shots, the BX1 allows for more forgiveness on minor errors, reducing the need for extensive practice to achieve precision.

3. **No Face Opening Required**: Traditional wedge play demands opening the face wide open to achieve the correct bounce. This technique takes time and practice to master. The BX-1 already has a built-in bevel, removing the need to adjust the face.

4. **Avoiding Shanks and Blades**: The BX-1 eliminates the risks of shanking or blading the ball due to its forgiving design, while traditional wedges often lead to these issues unless you've practiced extensively.

5. **Consistent Swing Mechanics**: With the BX-1, there’s no need to change your natural swing. Traditional wedges require you to alter your swing mechanics, making it necessary to invest time in practice to consistently make the adjustments.

6. **Faster Learning Curve**: Amateurs can quickly get out of bunkers with minimal practice by using the BX-1. The wedge is designed to perform like a pro’s open-face shot without demanding the same amount of skill or practice time.

7. **Confidence in the Sand**: With the BX-1, you can build confidence quickly because the club is more forgiving. This contrasts with traditional wedges where lack of confidence and fear of making mistakes lead to prolonged practice sessions.

8. **Normal Shot Setup**: The BX-1 allows for a standard shot setup, similar to a fairway shot, which is straightforward and familiar for most golfers, thereby reducing the necessity for special bunker shot practice. 

Check out the BX-1 at the link below...

videos.title: Paddy's DON'TS | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
Paddy's DON'TS | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the fourth Paddy’s Golf Tip is called “Paddy’s Don’ts”, or things you shouldn’t do in the golf swing. 
 
In this video I explain why you shouldn’t keep your head down during the swing and why you should avoid keeping your feet still at address and whilst swinging, as well as a number of other “dont’s”!

However, at the same time I also explain what you should do and demonstrate how, in each case.

 #padraigharrington  #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback 

SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE CONTENT: https://bit.ly/4gKoVme

About Padraig Harrington: 

Born in Dublin, Padraig is a proud family man married to Caroline with two children, Patrick and Ciaran. As a three time major champion, Padraig is one of the world’s top golfers and his playing record speaks for itself. Following a very successful amateur career, including winning the Walker Cup in 1995 at Royal Porthcawl in one of his three appearances, he turned professional in September 1995.

videos.title: Can We Match Rory McIlroy & Nelly Korda’s Driver Numbers in Just 10 Swings?
videos.summary_source_text:
Can We Match Rory McIlroy & Nelly Korda’s Driver Numbers in Just 10 Swings? 🏌️‍♂️ Clubhouse Golf – https://bit.ly/4eBgyeH

10 swings. That’s all we get.

In this video, Eloise and I take on a ridiculous challenge… using the TaylorMade Qi4D Driver to try and match the driver numbers of two of the best drivers in golf: Rory McIlroy and Nelly Korda.

Here’s the twist…

We each start with a driver that is as wrong as possible, and the other person has just 10 swings to fix the setup and get the numbers as close as possible to the Tour data.

That means adjusting:

loft
weighting
shaft feel
and trying to influence the swing to match the numbers

No pressure… just 10 swings to pull it off.

Can we actually get close to Rory and Nelly’s driver data?
Or is this challenge completely impossible?

Let us know in the comments who you think won the challenge!

videos.title: CHANGING NARRATIVES! The Ever-Changing Narrative Surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes
videos.summary_source_text:
CHANGING NARRATIVES! The Ever-Changing Narrative Surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes The Carolina Hurricanes are still getting the "cakewalk" narrative, even after going 8-0 to begin the playoffs. Why don't they ever get the credit they deserve? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes are still not getting the respect they deserve after sweeping the Ottawa Senators and the Philadelphia Flyers. The usual narrative is that the Stanley Cup Playoffs are the hardest to win a championship, but now it's a "cakewalk" for the Hurricanes. If it's a cakewalk, how is no other team (Colorado) not getting those narratives? Secondly, Zach dives into the numbers of how the Senators and Flyers weren't just "bad teams" in the playoffs, despite getting a wildcard and the third metropolitan spot compared to the Western Conference. There needs to be a path narrative and not this ever-changing goalpost moving on the Hurricanes. Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes, even with their recent playoff success, seem not to get the credit they deserve or the benefit of the doubt. It seems like the narrative is always the same: "Oh, it's the Hurricanes, who cares?" Why does this narrative need to change? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Pool för 850 000 kr: sälja fonder eller ta lån?
videos.summary_source_text:
Pool för 850 000 kr: sälja fonder eller ta lån? En familj ska bygga pool för 850 000 kr. Banken har godkänt lånet, belåningsgraden ligger under 50 %. Frågan: ska de sälja sina globala indexfonder på ISK för att slippa låna — eller behålla fonderna och ta lånet?

Mitt svar: behåll fonderna, ta lånet. Förväntad avkastning på en bred billig global indexfond är i snitt ~7 % per år över en 10-årsperiod. Det är högre än bolåneräntan. Mellanskillnaden är din — typ precis det som banker gör för att tjäna pengar.

Och nej, jag tycker inte att "den som är satt i skuld är icke fri" gäller alla. Det beror helt på förutsättningarna.

Hur tänker du? Skriv i kommentarerna.

Författat av Jan Bolmeson per publicerat datum. Vi äger själva indexfonder som nämns i videon. Vi är fristående från nämnda bolag och värdepapper; ingen ersättning har utgått om ej annat anges ovan. Vi avser inte följa upp detta innehåll.

Perfect your takeaway and wrist hinge — too much arm rotation is destroying your swing in the first foot. Eric Cogorno's 2 o'clock fix changes everything.

In This Video, You'll Discover:
•Takeaway mastery using the exact model Eric breaks down — hands straight back, club right down the toe line, toe in front of the heel
•Why wrist hinge in the golf swing is one of the two non-negotiable keys to staying on plane early — and how most golfers unknowingly eliminate it
•The two most common golf swing faults in the takeaway (too far inside AND too far outside) and the single fix that works for both
•A simple 2 o'clock visual that immediately corrects the club path in your golf drills practice — no guesswork, instant feedback

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: UK | 11th May, Monday – Ep 5 | How Automated Trading Systems Generate Consistent Returns
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 11th May, Monday – Ep 5 | How Automated Trading Systems Generate Consistent Returns In Episode 5 of the “RIFT Before You Quit” livestream series, we dive deep into how automated trading systems are designed to generate consistent returns in unpredictable markets — and why successful trading is not about predicting the market.

This advanced educational session explains:

Why markets are probabilistic, not predictable
Why most retail traders fail despite high win rates
How professional systems focus on consistency, execution, and risk management
The difference between manual trading and cycle-based automated trading
How the RIFT Auto Trading Engine uses structured execution and compounding strategies
Why systems outperform emotional trading over time

Key topics covered:
✅ Win Rate vs Profitability Explained
✅ Risk Management & Position Sizing
✅ Probability vs Prediction in Trading
✅ How Cycle-Based Trading Works
✅ Compounding & Reinvestment Strategies
✅ Structured Execution vs Emotional Trading
✅ Why Consistency Beats Random Trading
✅ Capital Preservation & Long-Term Growth
✅ Institutional Trading Principles
✅ How RIFT’s Alpha Flow, Smart Flow & Microflow Operate Together

The session also includes:

Real examples of compounding growth over 180 days
Explanation of the RIFT reinvest feature
How automated systems maintain consistency through multiple trade cycles
Why users often fail even with systems by interrupting the process
The psychology behind successful long-term automated trading

Community Q&A Topics:

Cold wallets vs hot wallets (Ledger, Tangem, etc.)
Why RIFT was created
Alpha Flow risk explanation
Unified flow strategy discussion
Hyperliquid scalability and liquidity
Future RIFT ecosystem developments
Upcoming futures and prediction layer upgrades
Institutional-grade infrastructure insights

Special Announcement:
The livestream also features discussion about participation in the Vietnam Unchained Summit, collaboration with regulators and government officials, self-custody education, blockchain adoption, and upcoming ecosystem developments including future products and integrations.

This episode is designed to help users, leaders, and affiliate marketers better understand the structure, logic, and long-term strategy behind the RIFT automated trading ecosystem. videos.title: Avalanche Respond and Take Command of Series After Huge Game 4 Win in Minnesota
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Respond and Take Command of Series After Huge Game 4 Win in Minnesota Colorado Avalanche seize control of their playoff series with a commanding 5-2 win over the Minnesota Wild, putting themselves one victory away from advancing. Can coach Jared Bednar’s bold goalie decision and the depth scoring from Ross Colton and Parker Kelly help the Avs close out in Denver?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Colorado’s bounce-back performance, spotlighting key moments such as Josh Manson’s double minor, the ESPN broadcast hiccups, and the outstanding play of Mackenzie Blackwood in net. The hosts analyze Nathan MacKinnon’s physical resilience, penalty-killing adjustments, and the crucial contributions from the Avalanche’s bottom six. With Minnesota on the brink and tensions flaring, will the Avs keep their composure and finish the job at Ball Arena?

videos.title: Hindi | 11th May, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 11th May, Monday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Struggling With Your 10-2  Try This Drill!
videos.summary_source_text:
Struggling With Your 10-2  Try This Drill! The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: DOUBLE SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Sweep Their Way to the Eastern Conference Final!
videos.summary_source_text:
DOUBLE SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Sweep Their Way to the Eastern Conference Final! The Carolina Hurricanes punched their ticket to the Eastern Conference Final for the second straight playoffs, and third time in four seasons. What stood out in Game 4 and Round 2 as the Hurricanes' stay undefeated through two rounds of the playoffs. On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes punched their ticket to their third Eastern Conference Final in four seasons. Furthermore, Zach discusses how the Canes joined some elite company, going 8-0 through the first two rounds and holding teams to 10 goals through eight games. Secondly, Zach talks about who stood out the most not only in Game 4, but the series as a whole. Who was the series MVP for the Hurricanes? Finally, Zach goes over why the Mark Jankowski extension is a win-win for both sides. What could this mean moving forward? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Grab The Ice For A Harder Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
Grab The Ice For A Harder Shot "Hands out and stay there." 
That's the cue that's quietly killing your shot.
If your top hand stays extended, you're stiff, you're pushing the puck instead of using leverage from the bounce and spring of your muscles and that stick flex everyone's chasing never actually shows up.

Here's the fix, these are the three steps modern NHL goal scorers use:

✅ Use the bounce and spring of your muscles by pulling the puck to the "sweet spot" and releasing using the elastic springs of your muscles.

✅ Keep your blade mostly in place while both hands move toward the net.

✅ When your hands are extended → pull your top hand into your body, chest, and then back to the crevice.

That pull-in is what grabs the ice. That's where the leverage comes from and when leverage is in the sweet spot, the flex happens on its own.

This is core Slingshot Shooting System mechanics which are reverse-engineered from how the world's best shooters generate their power.

🔗 Want the full system? Check out Train 2.0+ for complete access to the Slingshot Shooting System and the Downhill Skating System.

company." Jony Ive said it should feel like "a cabin by a lake." 
Court filings confirm it ships in early 2027. But nobody — not 
even OpenAI's own employees — seems able to describe what this 
device actually IS.

No screen. Not glasses. Not a watch. Not earbuds.

In this video, I break down EVERYTHING we know about OpenAI's 
mystery device — the confirmed timeline, the leaked form factors, 
the rumored price, and the one detail buried in a sworn legal 
filing that tells you exactly when this thing is launching.

way bigger than the headlines are letting on.

videos.title: The BEST and WORST Cardio for Fat Loss (SURPRISE!)
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST and WORST Cardio for Fat Loss (SURPRISE!) If you are doing cardio to lose fat, there is a good chance you are making the worst cardio mistakes everyone makes for fat loss without even knowing it. In this video, I am going to show you why the treadmill, elliptical, StairMaster, bike, and even your fitness tracker may be lying to you about how many calories you burned. If you use those numbers to decide how much more you can eat, you could be wiping out your calorie deficit.

Avoid These Cardio Mistakes Here - https://athleanx.com
Subscribe to This Channel Here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

The first cardio mistake for fat loss is using cardio as the main way to create your calorie deficit. Cardio can help you lose weight, but it should not be the foundation of your fat loss plan. You cannot outrun a bad diet. One bad meal, snack, or portion mistake can erase an hour of cardio fast. If you want to lose fat and keep it off, clean up your nutrition first and use cardio to support those efforts.

The next mistake is trusting the calorie number on the machine. Most cardio machines estimate calories using METs, or metabolic equivalents. Many estimates are based on one standard body weight, often around 154 pounds. If you weigh more or less than that, the number on the screen is already wrong. If the machine does not ask for your body weight, do not trust the calorie count.

Another mistake is not realizing that some machines may count calories you would have burned anyway. Your resting energy expenditure is the energy you burn sitting around doing nothing. If a treadmill says you burned 420 calories, that may not mean you burned 420 extra calories from the workout. Part of that number may include your resting burn, which means you are overestimating your true exercise calories.

Leaning on the machine is one of the biggest cardio mistakes people make. Holding onto the treadmill, leaning over the bike, hanging on the StairMaster, or unloading your body weight with your arms makes the exercise easier. Easier means less work and fewer calories burned. If your goal is fat loss, stand tall, keep your hands off the rails when possible, and make your body do the work.

Cutting your range of motion short also kills cardio results. On the stepmill or StairMaster, short, choppy steps reduce the work you do and prevent full hip extension. The elliptical can lock you into a shortened range of motion too. Just like a half rep curl is not as effective as a full rep, half reps on cardio are not giving you the best fat loss return.

Some cardio machines are more inaccurate than others. The stationary bike is usually one of the better options, especially when it uses watts and lets you enter your body weight. The StairMaster can be fairly close if you are not leaning on it. The treadmill can be off because of calibration issues. The elliptical is the worst offender because the calorie estimates can be way off.

If you think you burned 130 more calories than you actually did and eat those calories back every day, you can erase your deficit. Over time, that mistake can be the difference between losing fat and gaining weight.

If you want better cardio for fat loss, choose machines that make you do more total work. The air bike, rowing machine, and ski erg are great options because they involve both the upper and lower body with real effort. They are harder, and that is the point. The more muscles you involve, the more work you do, and the more calories you burn.

If you still want to use your favorite cardio machine, use one that allows you to enter your body weight. Then stop staring at the calorie display. Throw a towel over the screen and judge your effort by your breathing. If you can easily carry on a conversation, you are probably not working hard enough. If your breathing is challenged, your effort and calorie burn are likely higher.

A simple rule is to take the calorie number the machine gives you and cut it in half. Do not assume your fitness watch fixes the problem either. Wearables can be inaccurate too, so use them for trends, not as a precise calorie calculator.

If you are looking for a complete step by step training and nutrition plan designed to help you build muscle, burn fat, and look your best, be sure to head to athleanx.com and use the program selector tool to find the plan that matches your goals.

For more videos on how to lose fat, build muscle, and train smarter without wasting time on common workout mistakes, be sure to subscribe to our channel here on youtube via the link above and remember to turn on your notifications. The StairMaster can be fairly close if you are not leaning on it. The treadmill can be off because of calibration issues. The elliptical is the worst offender because the calorie estimates can be way off.

If you think you burned 130 more calories than you actually did and eat those calories back every day, you can erase your deficit. Over time, that mistake can be the difference between losing fat and gaining weight.

If you want better cardio for fat loss, choose machines that make you do more total work. The air bike, rowing machine, and ski erg are great options because they involve both the upper and lower body with real effort. They are harder, and that is the point. The more muscles you involve, the more work you do, and the more calories you burn.

If you still want to use your favorite cardio machine, use one that allows you to enter your body weight. Then stop staring at the calorie display. Throw a towel over the screen and judge your effort by your breathing. If you can easily carry on a conversation, you are probably not working hard enough. If your breathing is challenged, your effort and calorie burn are likely higher.

A simple rule is to take the calorie number the machine gives you and cut it in half. Do not assume your fitness watch fixes the problem either. Wearables can be inaccurate too, so use them for trends, not as a precise calorie calculator.

If you are looking for a complete step by step training and nutrition plan designed to help you build muscle, burn fat, and look your best, be sure to head to athleanx.com and use the program selector tool to find the plan that matches your goals.

For more videos on how to lose fat, build muscle, and train smarter without wasting time on common workout mistakes, be sure to subscribe to our channel here on youtube via the link above and remember to turn on your notifications.
videos.summary: The BEST and WORST Cardio for Fat Loss (SURPRISE!) If you are doing cardio to lose fat, there is a good chance you are making the worst cardio mistakes everyone makes for fat loss without even knowing it. In this video, I am going to show you why the treadmill, elliptical, StairMaster, bike, and even your fitness tracker may be lying to you about how many calories you burned.

videos.title: Snittspararen lägger bara sex minuter på varje aktieköp

Bara 7 av 484 sparare tittade på risk-statistik som beta eller volatilitet innan köp. 70 % av prischarts dom tittade på visade bara dagens kursrörelse.

Det är därför forskningen rekommenderar bred, billig, global indexfond — eller fondrobot för dig som vill ha det enkelt.

videos.title: Is This The Best Value Putter In Golf Right Now?
videos.summary_source_text:
Is This The Best Value Putter In Golf Right Now? Rick gets his hands on the Wilson Infinite ZT putters,  a face-balanced, zero-twist design that promises tour-level performance for £200. But do they actually deliver, or is the price tag the most impressive thing about them? Watch to find out.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

How To Actually Trade With Claude AI (Full Beginner Setup) ⚡ FREE RESOURCES FROM THIS VIDEO

→ Sign up to your exchange - Bybit, Toobit, WEEX + get instant access to 500+ ready-to-automate trading strategies inside Strategy Factory:
https://bit.ly/3QY3QwU

→ Get the full workbook Davidd uses + Trader Dev Skill files + Full Prompt Library: https://bit.ly/4dhPHSD

→ Free AI Trading Workshop with Davidd: https://bit.ly/4u7bPq2

→ Want it all sent to you directly? Comment "AI agent" below and Davidd will DM you the workbook, the Skill, the prompt library and the setup guide.

→ Free TradingView indicators Davidd built: [https://daviddtech.com](https://daviddtech.com/)

→ trader.dev (Davidd's MCP server that connects Claude with your trading workflows):  https://bit.ly/4dhPHSD

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 ABOUT THIS VIDEO

This is the AI trading bot setup Davidd uses every single day.

Imagine talking to Claude out loud, like a human.

Putting your phone away.

Coming back 5 minutes later.

videos.title: AI Is Being Built Into New Homes
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Is Being Built Into New Homes Your future home might come with an AI supercomputer built into the wall.

NVIDIA, Pulte Group, and startup SPAN are working on homes with built-in mini data centers packed with Blackwell GPUs, AMD CPUs, and terabytes of RAM.

So in the future, your house could potentially run your own personal AI locally and maybe even rent out unused compute power to companies like OpenAI or Anthropic when you’re not using it.

Would you want this in your home?

Perfect Your Takeaway And Wrist Hinge In Under 6 Minutes Perfect your takeaway and wrist hinge — too much arm rotation is destroying your swing in the first foot. Eric Cogorno's 2 o'clock fix changes everything.

⛳ 0:29 The Hideki Model — Hands Straight Back, Club Down the Toe Line
🎯 1:08 Why a Correct Takeaway Sets Up Your Entire Golf Swing
💥 1:37 The #1 Takeaway Mistake: Why 80% of Golfers Go Too Far Inside
⚡ 2:12 The Secret to a Great Takeaway — The 2 O'Clock Feeling
🔥 2:42 Two Root Causes: Too Much Arm Rotation & Not Enough Wrist Hinge
✅ 3:10 The Other Common Error: Hands and Club Going Out
🏆 4:06 The Only Takeaway Drill You'll Ever Need (Two Rehearsals, One Hit)
🚀 5:12 The 30-Day Challenge That Will Transform Your Takeaway

In This Video, You'll Discover:
•Takeaway mastery using the exact model Eric breaks down — hands straight back, club right down the toe line, toe in front of the heel
•Why wrist hinge in the golf swing is one of the two non-negotiable keys to staying on plane early — and how most golfers unknowingly eliminate it
•The two most common golf swing faults in the takeaway (too far inside AND too far outside) and the single fix that works for both
•A simple 2 o'clock visual that immediately corrects the club path in your golf drills practice — no guesswork, instant feedback
•How to use the two-rehearsal, one-hit drill with the Swing Coach app or video to lock in a correct, on-plane takeaway for good
•The 30-day half-swing protocol that Eric Cogorno uses with students to permanently rewire the start of the golf swing
•Why rushing to full swing too fast is the reason most golf lessons and range sessions don't stick — and how to avoid that trap

What separates this from a generic takeaway tip is the precision of the prescription: 20 reps, three times a week, half swings only, for a full 30 days — nothing longer until the pattern is locked in. Eric Cogorno built this protocol around the two root causes he sees in 80% of the golfers he works with: excess arm rotation and insufficient wrist hinge in the golf swing, both of which are addressed simultaneously by the 2 o'clock drill. Use the Swing Coach app or down-the-line video to confirm the shaft is riding the toe line on every rep — that feedback loop is what makes the 30-day commitment actually work.

videos.title: China is WINNING the luxury car BATTLE!
videos.summary_source_text:
China is WINNING the luxury car BATTLE! Thanks to everyone who lent us their cars for this video: 
- Zeekr 8X: https://www.instagram.com/kainiansgarage/ 
- Rolls-Royce Cullinan: https://www.instagram.com/seanysgarage

It’s time for a China vs Britain luxury showdown! 

Mat’s got his hands on the range-topping Zeekr 8X, and he’s going to compare it to a 5-year-old, second-hand Rolls-Royce Cullinan to see if massive tech can truly unseat the king of luxury SUVs. 

If you’re looking solely for performance, it’s easy to see why you may choose the Zeekr. It may only be equipped with a 2-litre 4-cylinder turbo petrol engine, but this is used to power three electric motors which combine to produce a staggering 1,400hp and 1,410Nm of torque!

In comparison, the Cullinan may have a huge 6.75-litre twin-turbo V12, but this can ‘only’ produce 571hp and 850Nm. However, the Rolls-Royce is the lighter of the two at 2,660kg, whereas the Zeekr’s heavy battery tech pushes it up to 2,820 kg!

But chances are, if you’re in the market for one of these two cars, luxury tech and quality features are likely to be top of your agenda, and both of these cars are stacked full of them. Both cars come with soft-close automatic doors, massage seats in the front (although the Zeekr has them in the rear as well), and large infotainment screens in the front. However, while the interiors of both cars are styled relatively well, the Rolls easily wins it thanks to the quality of the materials throughout the cabin. Almost any element you touch feels expensive - but what else would you expect from a Rolls-Royce!

However, there’s one area where the Zeekrs wins hands down - the price. The Rolls-Royce we have here, despite being 5 years old and second-hand, still costs £250,000. As for the Zeekr? As new, it only costs £54,300! 

So will Mat prefer the Zeekr to the Rolls-Royce? You’ll need to keep watching to see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1105

videos.title: Tiger Woods Record Broken | Every Shot From Yurav Premlall’s Winning Back Nine
videos.summary_source_text:
Tiger Woods Record Broken | Every Shot From Yurav Premlall’s Winning Back Nine Rewatch Yurav Premlall's Winning Back 9 at the Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship in the Back 9 on Sunday presented by Nexo. Premlall stormed to a stunning 14-shot victory as he claimed his maiden DP World Tour title surpassing Tiger Woods' previous record winning margin of 12 shots for a maiden title on the DP World Tour.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The DP World Tour is back to where it all started this week. Spain was the host of the first ever DP World Tour - then European Tour - event in 1972 so it is fitting that it is where the 2026 European Swing gets started. The fourth of five Global Swings on the 2026 Race to Dubai, the European Swing consists of six counting events - four of which are national opens - with the US PGA Championship and U.S. Open also happening within the same timeframe. Spain has long been one of the world's great golfing nations and this week local heroes will take centre stage, with a string of established and rising stars searching for home glory. Nacho Elvira has already won in 2026 and will be hungry for more, as will fellow winners in recent seasons Eugenio Chacarra, Alejandro del Rey, Angel Hidalgo and Pablo Larrazábal.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: 465. Finansbranschens tre stora problem — med Per Palmström
videos.summary_source_text:
465. Finansbranschens tre stora problem — med Per Palmström Tre problem i svensk finansrådgivning som Finansinspektionen själv har dokumenterat men ingenting har hänt. Per Palmström och Jan Bolmeson om vad som är fel och varför.

Jan hade nyligen tre minuter med statsminister Ulf Kristersson och EU:s talman Roberta Metsola. Det här avsnittet är vad han ville säga — baserat på offentlig data från Finansinspektionen, Mercer och SCB.

Per Palmström (jurist och oberoende finansiell rådgivare, medgrundare på Evida) går igenom tre konkreta problem:

▸ Incitamentsproblem i rådgivningen - Storbankskunder betalar i snitt 1 % i fondavgift, mot 0,4 % hos  nätmäklare. 80 % av storbankskunderna har en aktivt förvaltad fond, mot 50 % hos nätmäklarna. Skillnaden är inte slumpmässig.

▸ Försäkringskryphålet i tjänstepensionen - Av 4 600 miljarder i tjänstepensioner ligger 2 500 miljarder i traditionell försäkring — ofta med flera procentenheter lägre avkastning än en bred, billig global indexfond.

▸ Finansiell utbildning saknas - Svensk grundskola ägnar ungefär lika mycket tid åt privatekonomi 
   som åt att rensa fisk. FI rekommenderade ett totalt provisionsförbud 2016 — tio år senare har ingenting hänt.

══════════════════════

KAPITEL

00:03:33 - Vad som är bra i det svenska finanssystemet – positiv start
00:05:03 - Välfärdsstaten minskar behovet av privatsparande

00:28:48 - Per: banker borde inte äga fondbolag – intressekonflikten är oundviklig
00:31:00 - Provisionsdriven rådgivning ger lägre avkastning – äldre sparare betalar mest
